name: Mel-High Shredded Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds beef chuck roast or round steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef in oil on both sides in a Dutch oven until golden brown.
2. Add onion and celery when the meat is almost browned.
3. Pour in broth; cover and simmer 3-4 hours or until the meat is tender.
4. Remove the meat and let it cool, then shred it.
5. Drain the vegetables, reserving about 1 1/2 cups of broth.
6. Skim any fat from the liquid.
7. Return the shredded meat, drained vegetables, and reserved broth to the Dutch oven.
8. Add the remaining ingredients.
9. Simmer until heated through.
10. This dish keeps well in a slow cooker on low heat.
11. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
